title: Developer seeking accelerated FDA approval of mitapivat for SCD
summary:
Agios Pharmaceuticals has filed an application with the U.S. Food and Drug Administration (FDA) seeking accelerated approval of mitapivat, its oral therapy for sickle cell disease(SCD).
[...]
The application includes data from the global Phase 2/3 RISE UP clinical trial (NCT05031780), demonstrating that mitapivat — which works by activating a protein called pyruvate kinase, or PK — significantly boosted hemoglobin levels, the oxygen-carrying protein in red blood cells, in people with SCD.
[...]

title: REGENXBIO Shares Topline Results from Pivotal Phase III AFFINITY DUCHENNE® Study of RGX-202 - Parent Project Muscular Dystrophy
summary:
REGENXBIO Inc. has announced positive topline and interim functional data from the pivotal Phase III portion of the Phase I/II/III AFFINITY DUCHENNE® trial of RGX-202, an investigational gene therapy being developed for individuals with Duchenne muscular dystrophy. RGX-202 is designed to deliver a microdystrophin via AAV8 through a one-time IV infusion.
[...]

title: Closing the 90% Gap: Biotech's Push for Free Alpha-1 Genetic Testing - BriefGlance.com
summary:
DURHAM, NC – May 13, 2026 – A groundbreaking partnership announced today aims to solve a decades-old medical mystery: why over 90% of individuals with a serious genetic condition remain undiagnosed. Biotechnology firm Beam Therapeutics has become an inaugural sponsor of AlphaDetect, a new non-profit dedicated to providing free, widespread genetic testing for Alpha-1 Antitrypsin Deficiency (Alpha-1), a progressive and irreversible disease affecting the lungs and liver.

title: FDA Approves New Dosing Option for CRYSVITA® (burosumab-twza) in Adults With XLH - BioSpace

title: FDA Approves Sonrotoclax for Mantle Cell Lymphoma
summary:
On May 13, the U.S. Food and Drug Administration (FDA) granted accelerated approval to sonrotoclax (Beqalzi) for adults with relapsed or refractory mantle cell lymphoma (MCL) who have had at least two lines of therapy that include a Bruton’s tyrosine kinase (BTK) inhibitor. The approval marks the first new BCL2 inhibitor approved by the agency in a decade, according to BeOne Medicines, the drug’s manufacturer.
[...]
The agency based its decision on results from the single-group, multicenter BGB-

summary:

title: 全球首个LAD-I基因疗法终获批，9名患儿的重生，绝症不再“绝”-36氪
summary:
FDA批准Rocket基因疗法Kresladi，治疗LAD-I儿科患者。
[...]
近日，FDA宣布正式批准Rocket Pharmaceuticals（NASDAQ: RCKT）开发的Kresladi（marnetegragene autotemcel）上市，用于治疗因ITGB2基因双等位基因变异导致的重症白细胞黏附缺陷症I型（LAD-I）儿科患者，且这些患者无法获得合适的人类白细胞抗原（HLA）匹配的异体造血干细胞移植。这是全球首个获批用于治疗LAD-I的基因疗法，也是LAD-I近20年首个治疗新选择。
[...]
Rocket需开展
[...]
Kresladi的上市申请主要基于一项编号为NCT03812263的全球多中心I/II期临床试验。该研究为开放标签、单臂设计，共纳入9例重症LAD-I患儿，年龄范围5个月至9岁，均为ITGB2基因双等位基因变异导致的重症患者，且无合适HLA匹配同胞供体。患者分别在三个中心接受治疗：UCLA（6例）、英国伦敦（2例）和西班牙（1例）。
[...]
治疗后，患者中性粒细胞

title: BeOne wins mantle cell lymphoma approval, opening new therapy class - BioSpace
summary: ## Beqalzi is the first BCL2 inhibitor approved for relapsed or refractory mantle cell lymphoma. The FDA has cleared BeOne Medicines’ BCL2 blocker sonrotoclax for the treatment of certain patients with mantle cell lymphoma, an approval that opens a new approach to treating this malignancy. title: Regenxbio's Duchenne gene therapy clears phase 3 hurdle - pharmaphorum
summary: **Regenxbio is pitching at FDA approval next year for its Duchenne muscular dystrophy (DMD) gene therapy RGX-202, after reporting topline results from a pivotal phase 3 trial.**. In the AFFINITY DUCHENNE study, RGX-202 achieved its primary endpoint, with 93% of patients treated with the therapy achieving expression of microdystrophin – designed to replace the dystrophin protein that is defective in DMD – at the target level of 10% or more, measured at 12 weeks. If approved, RGX-202 would be the

title: FDA hands BeOne, Taiho approvals for blood cancers - pharmaphorum
summary: **BeOne Medicines' Beqalzi has been cleared for a form of lymphoma by the FDA, and the US regulator has also granted a second approval to Taiho Oncology's Inqovi in leukaemia.**. First up, the accelerated approval for Beqalzi (sonrotoclax), which BeOne describes as a "next-generation" BCL2 inhibitor, as a third-line or later therapy for mantle cell lymphoma (MCL), a form of non-Hodgkin lymphoma (NHL). title: FDA blocked melanoma drug as confusion reigned under Makary - CBS News
summary: The Food and Drug Administration's recent decision to withhold approval of a new skin cancer treatment fell like a hammer on doctors who treat melanoma and patients who saw that the drug had prolonged the lives of a third of the participants in a clinical trial. "It was devastating news," said Trisha Wise-Draper, a dermatologist at the University of Cincinnati who had patients enrolled in the trial. summary: Patient demand has surged for a pancreatic cancer drug in the US after promising trial results.
